summary: Completed testing of TikTok Ad Intelligence dashboard, AI Product Launch Simulator (GPT 5.2), and weekly competitor scan scheduled task. All 23 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified: (1) TikTok Intelligence page at /tiktok-intelligence shows 1.1B Total TikTok Views, 30 Products Tracked stats, viral products list, category performance bars, trending patterns (2) LaunchSimulator component on product detail page shows 'Powered by GPT 5.2', 'Generate AI Launch Strategy' button with projections (3) Sidebar has 'TikTok Intel' and 'Competitors' navigation links
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/tools/tiktok-intelligence returns 200 (public endpoint)
Backend: TikTok Intelligence returns viral_products array with id, product_name, tiktok_views, launch_score, category
Backend: TikTok Intelligence returns categories array with name, total_views, product_count
Backend: TikTok Intelligence returns trending_patterns array with pattern, relevance, description
Backend: TikTok Intelligence returns stats object with total_tiktok_views (1.1B), products_tracked (30), avg_launch_score, top_category
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/simulate/{product_id} requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/simulate/{product_id} returns 200 with simulation data (profit_per_sale, estimated_cvr, daily_sales_range)
Backend: Simulate returns potential rating (High/Moderate/Risky)
Backend: Simulate returns guidance text
Backend: Simulate returns 404 for invalid product ID
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/ai-simulate/{product_id} requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/ai-simulate/{product_id} returns 200 with ai_analysis (GPT 5.2 powered)
Backend: AI Simulate returns ai_analysis with verdict and confidence_score
Backend: AI Simulate returns strategy with phase_1, phase_2, phase_3
Backend: AI Simulate returns target_audience with primary, secondary, platforms
Backend: AI Simulate returns revenue_projection with month_1, month_3, month_6
Backend: GET /api/jobs/status returns 200 with scheduler info
Backend: Scheduler has 18 registered tasks
Backend: weekly_competitor_scan is registered with description 'Re-scan all tracked competitor stores and notify users of changes'
Backend: weekly_competitor_scan has default_schedule '0 6 * * 1' (Monday 6 AM)
Backend: weekly_competitor_scan is in scheduler job list
Frontend: TikTok Intelligence page (/tiktok-intelligence) renders with header 'TikTok Ad Intelligence'
Frontend: TikTok Intelligence shows stats cards (1.1B views, 30 products, 41 avg score, Home Decor top category)
Frontend: TikTok Intelligence shows Top Viral Products list with 10 products
Frontend: TikTok Intelligence shows Category Performance section with bars
Frontend: TikTok Intelligence shows Trending Ad Patterns section
Frontend: LaunchSimulator component on product detail page shows 'AI Launch Simulator' header
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows 'Powered by GPT 5.2' tagline
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows 'Generate AI Launch Strategy' button (data-testid='ai-analysis-btn')
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows projection cards (Profit per Sale, Est. Conversion, Break-even Ad Cost, Daily Sales Range)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation has 'TikTok Intel' link navigating to /tiktok-intelligence
Frontend: Sidebar navigation has 'Competitors' link navigating to /competitor-tracker
seed_data_creation: None - existing products and competitor stores used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C TikTok Intelligence and AI Launch Simulator features fully tested. (1) GET /api/tools/tiktok-intelligence is PUBLIC - aggregates products with tiktok_views > 0, returns viral_products, categories, trending_patterns, stats. Stats show total_tiktok_views, products_tracked, avg_launch_score, top_category. (2) GET /api/ad-tests/simulate/{product_id} requires auth - returns base simulation data (profit_per_sale, estimated_cvr, breakeven_ad_cost, daily_sales_range, potential rating, guidance). (3) GET /api/ad-tests/ai-simulate/{product_id} requires auth - uses GPT 5.2 via emergentintegrations, takes 10-15 seconds, returns ai_analysis with verdict, confidence_score, strategy (3 phases), target_audience, revenue_projection (month_1/3/6), risk_assessment, creative_angles. (4) weekly_competitor_scan scheduled task registered for Monday 6 AM, uses aiohttp to re-scan Shopify stores. (5) TikTokIntelligencePage uses DashboardLayout (auth required), LaunchSimulator is on ProductDetailPage at /product/:id. (6) Sidebar has 'TikTok Intel' and 'Competitors' links.

TikTok Intelligence API.details: Returns viral_products (top 10), categories (top 8), trending_patterns (5), stats (1.1B views, 30 products tracked)

Base Launch Simulator API.details: Returns simulation with profit_per_sale, estimated_cvr, breakeven_ad_cost, daily_sales_range, potential (High/Moderate/Risky), guidance

AI Launch Simulator API.details: Returns base simulation + ai_analysis (verdict, confidence_score, strategy phases, target_audience, revenue_projection, risk_assessment, creative_angles)

Weekly Competitor Scan Task.details: Re-scans tracked competitor Shopify stores using aiohttp, detects product changes, creates notifications

TikTok Intelligence Page UI.details: Shows stats cards (1.1B views, 30 products), viral products list, category performance bars, trending patterns

LaunchSimulator Component UI.details: Shows AI Launch Simulator header, 'Powered by GPT 5.2', projection cards, 'Generate AI Launch Strategy' button

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - AI simulator uses real GPT 5.2 via emergentintegrations
